texto: The American people know the economy is too weak. Too many of them are suffering. So the question for Washington is, are we going to continue to play political games and - and - or are we going to say, we can do something right now to create jobs, to put money in the pockets of the middle-class, hire construction workers, teachers, veterans?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de David Plouffe que provoca temas ligados a trabalho. Ao questionar “The American people know the economy is too weak. Too many of them are suffering. So the question…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre trabalho, veterans, american, com foco em trabalho e american.
